values.value: SELECT Id, Identifier, RegulatoryAuthorizationType.Name, Account__r.Name, PeriodStart, PeriodEnd, Status FROM BusinessLicense WHERE Recordtype.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSPermitLicense' AND Status = 'Active' AND RegulatoryAuthorizationType.Name IN ('Child Care License', 'Drinking Water Construction Permit', 'Drinking Water Operating Permit', 'Food Premise Operating Permit', 'High Risk Temporary Food Service Operating Permit', 'Industrial Camp Operating Permit', 'Low Risk Temporary Food Service Operating Permit', 'Pool Construction Permit', 'Pool Operating Permit', 'Residential Care Facility License', 'Sewerage Holding Tank Permit to Construct', 'Water Source Evaluation') ORDER By CreatedDate DESC
